gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor steps forward, opens both arms wide with enthusiasm, and smiles while inviting everyone to explore the topic
a person gestures gently with both hands, forming three distinct groups in the air to illustrate the concept clearly
a tutor moves one hand to the side while lifting the other hand upward, adding motions as if counting to represent repeated addition
a person raises both hands to show three separate fingers on one hand and points confidently as they explain the total equals nine
a tutor steps slightly to the right, extending arms to mimic rows and columns while encouraging the class to visualize the array
a person shifts weight back and forth, looking around at the learners with curiosity, while asking about the total number of squares
a tutor jumps slightly in place, claps hands together with joy, and beams while celebrating the achievement of finding nine
